name: Hawaiian Airlines World Elite Mastercard
perks: 2x miles at gas stations, dining, and grocery stores
$100 companion discount certificate each account anniversary
First checked bag free on Hawaiian Airlines for cardholder
Priority boarding on Hawaiian Airlines flights
One-time 50% off companion discount for HawaiianMiles members
Miles do not expire for active cardmembers
drawbacks: Miles primarily useful for Hawaiian Airlines routes (Hawaii, Pacific, limited mainland)
Companion discount only for economy class
Hawaiian Airlines now part of Alaska Airlines merger, program changes possible
